calendar.matters:
Motion For Final Judgment As To Interested Parties Quan Do And Diane Zuniga-Bernal; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Antonio Hernandez; Declaration Of Detective Sergeant Joel Hassna; Declaration Of Tracy Sacca; Exhibit List; Exhibits; Proposed Order; Proposed Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-31-2023 Off Calendar

Motion For Final Judgment As To Interested Parties Quan Do And Diane Zuniga-Bernal; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Antonio Hernandez; Declaration Of Detective Sergeant Joel Hassna; Declaration Of Tracy Sacca; Exhibit List; Exhibits; Proposed Order; Proposed Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-11-2023 Continued To Feb-14-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (by Zoom):
Antonio Hernandez, Esq. 510-622-2146 Atty. General of the State of California for Petitioner.
Isaac Safier, Esq 415-967-0125 Law Office of Rebecca Feigelson for Claimant Quan Do.
Chris Morales, Esq. for Interested party Diane Zuniga-Bernal.

RULING - A R G U E D.Hearing is held. Mr. Hernandez informs the Court they have an agreement and stipulation on the division of the property and requests to set the matter a month out. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion For Final Judgment As To Interested Parties Quan Do And Diane Zuniga-Bernal.

Continued to 2/14/23 at 9:30am in Dept. 302. Parties can submit their stipulation prior to the hearing date.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/rbu)

Motion For Final Judgment As To Interested Parties Quan Do And Diane Zuniga-Bernal; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Antonio Hernandez; Declaration Of Detective Sergeant Joel Hassna; Declaration Of Tracy Sacca; Exhibit List; Exhibits; Proposed Order; Proposed Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-14-2022 Continued To Jan-11-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom Conference
ADA Antonio Hernandez, Esq., Office of the District Attorney, 628-652-4376, Tony.Hernandez@sfgov.org, for petitioner People of the State of California
Isaac Safier, Esq., Law Office of Rebecca Feigelson, 415-967-0125, isaacsafier@gmail.com. for Claimant Quan Do,

Hearing is held, not argued. Claimant's late filed opposition is discussed. Counsel for claimant makes an oral request for continaunce.

The Court modifies the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion For Final Judgment As To Interested Parties Quan Do And Diane Zuniga-Bernal is continued to January 11, 2023 per the agreement of all parties present in court.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
